title: Clientpack
description: a fully, client side pack that is made for multiplayer/server use. made by the fish bros youtube channel @the-fish-bros-from-ohio
body:
client side pack for servers that has mods like sodium jei jade and clock hud along with bare bones and complamentory umbound

also to see all mods and recorce packs click on the version and scroll down to dependencies or read further

also feel free to edit/use anything in this pack


# **Main Mods**:


<details>
<summary>sound mods:</summary>

ambiant sounds

constant music

dynamic surroundings

partical rain

sound physics remasterd

</details>


<details>
<summary>gui mods</summary>

advancement plaqes

better anvancments

brightness +

chat heads

chat toggle

cherished worlds 

clock hud

cursors extended

durablety tooltip

jade

item highliter

inv move


<details>
<summary>jei and addons</summary>

jei

just enough recorces

just enough beacons reforged

just enough effect descriptions

just enough breeding

</details>

more enchantment info

legendary tooltips

relpay mod

screenshot vewer

scribble

show me your skin

status effect bars

talk ballons

travlers titles

vital stats (mob health bar)

what are they up to

zoomify

xaeros minimap and worldmap

</details>


<details>
<summary>qol mods</summary>

apple skin

controling

destraction free recipes

cut through

locked on

pickup notifier

mouse tweaks

vt downloader

</details>


<details>
<summary>performance mods</summary>

clumps

dynamic fps

enhanced block entitys

entity culling

ferite core

lithium

more culling

sodium

sodium leaf culling

</details>


<details>
<summary>visual mods</summary>

3d skin layers

first person model

iris shaders

lambs dynamic lights

model gap fix

not enough anamations

better combat

wakes

</details>


<details>
<summary>partical mods</summary>

effective

falling leavs

make bubbles pop

partical core

partical effects

subtle effects

</details>

bare bones x partical effects

goofy villagers

<details>
